question: What are the application deadlines in Piemonte / Torino?
answer: For the academic year 2025/26 in Piemonte/Torino, the application deadline for both scholarships and accommodation benefits is September 9, 2025, by 12:00 p.m. The online application must be submitted by this time, as the system closes automatically at the deadline. Additionally, non-resident students who need to submit a paid accommodation self-certification must follow the specific procedures and time frames indicated, accessible via their Online Helpdesk page, aligned with this deadline. International students not resident in Italy must attach a signed PDF application and valid ID, considering up to 6 hours needed to obtain a Temporary Access Code to submit on time.
